action.reasoning: Observation: PyG import test still segfaults (exit 139) on torch_geometric.nn/data/loader; current workspace has GNN code but broken env prevents it. FP+MLP from iters 7-12 stable at ~0.162 test AP / 0.177 val AP with caches present. Analysis: Env PyG/CUDA mismatch unfixable without network; NaN issues previously from unmasked labels in BCE/sklearn (fixed by is_labeled + nan_to_num). FP-MLP fast with manual batches, no graphs. Decision: Overwrite model/train/predict.py with robust RDKit Morgan FP (2048-bit, fixed mol reconstruction+ring init), MLP (no BN for stability), masked BCE, pos_weights, ReduceLROnPlateau on val AP, per-epoch jsonl logging, 25 epochs. Train then submit_eval on best.pt for improved avg_precision baseline.
